---
title: enforce-switch-style
description: "Require default clauses to be last."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Require default clauses to be last. Strider default: default optional.

## Bad

```go
switch value { default: fallback(); case 1: one() }
```

## Good

```go
switch value { case 1: one(); default: fallback() }
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only enforce-switch-style`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
